name: Podcast → Newsletter Draft
description: Turns a podcast episode into a newsletter draft your audience can read in a few minutes. Lets you mail your list off the back of an episode without rewriting it by hand.
prompt_template: Take the podcast episode I name and pull the key takeaways and best moments. Draft a newsletter that opens with a hook, walks through the main points in plain language, and ends with a clear next step for the reader. Write it in my voice from my brain. Give it to me as a draft I can edit before it goes to my list.
